title: Property Tax Relief for Disabled Veterans
summary: Property tax relief for eligible disabled veterans in Tennessee.
eligibilityNotes: Veteran must be rated 100% Permanent and Total by the VA.

title: Tennessee State Parks: Free Day
summary: Free admission on designated dates and complimentary camping/golf offers tied to service branch birthdays (see official page for current details).
eligibilityNotes: Dates and offers vary by year and service branch. See the official page for the current schedule, documentation requirements, and reservation instructions.

title: Tennessee State Parks: Offseason Discount
summary: Offseason discounts may be available for eligible Tennessee residents at participating state parks (see official page for dates and details).
eligibilityNotes: Eligibility and discount rules can change. Verify current requirements, dates, and participating locations on the official page and bring required documentation when booking/purchasing.

title: Tennessee State Parks: Lodging Benefit for 100% Service-Connected Veterans
summary: Certain lodging/camping benefits may be available for veterans rated 100% service-connected (see official page for details).
eligibilityNotes: Verify eligible locations/rates and required documentation on the official page. Present proof of eligibility when booking.

title: Disabled Veteran Hunting & Fishing License (One-time $10)
summary: A permanent sport combination hunting and fishing license may be available to eligible Tennessee residents for a one-time $10 fee.
eligibilityNotes: Requires Tennessee residency and qualifying disability/service criteria. See official guidance for documentation requirements and definitions.

title: Property Tax Relief for Surviving Spouses
summary: Property tax relief may be available to eligible surviving spouses of disabled veterans, subject to specific conditions.
eligibilityNotes: Surviving spouse must not remarry, must own (solely or jointly) and use the home as their primary residence. Additional rules may apply based on when the veteran would have qualified. Apply through your County Trustee and verify details on the official page.

title: Veteran Designation on Tennessee Driver License / Photo ID
summary: Tennessee offers a veteran designation on a TN driver license or photo ID with DD-214 documentation and applicable fees.
eligibilityNotes: Visit a Driver Services Center and present a certified or original DD-214. Standard issuance/renewal fees apply. If not renewing, a duplicate may be obtained (fees listed on the official page).

title: County Motor Vehicle Privilege Tax Relief for Disabled Veterans
summary: County motor vehicle privilege tax relief for eligible disabled veterans in Tennessee.
eligibilityNotes: Veteran must be rated 100% Permanent and Total by the VA. Verify required documentation and application steps on the official page.

title: Highways for Heroes (CDL Program)
summary: Tennessee program that may waive the road skills test for qualified military personnel applying for a Tennessee Commercial Driver License (CDL).
eligibilityNotes: Eligibility depends on service history and program requirements. See official page for qualifying criteria, documentation, and application steps.
